reviews.title: Field reports
reviews.subtitle: Observations from organizations operating with NEXURA infrastructure.

items.quote: We replaced four disconnected systems with one quiet layer. The team stopped firefighting and started building.
items.author: M. Tremblay

items.quote: The assessment exposed bottlenecks we had normalized for years. The recommendations were uncomfortably precise.
items.author: S. Reyes

items.quote: Their work is invisible until you look at the numbers. Then it becomes impossible to ignore.
items.author: J. Côté

footer.description: NEXURA helps companies centralize operations and automate workflows.
footer.law25Notice: NEXURA applies privacy and data handling practices aligned with Quebec Law 25.

chat.title: Ask NEXURA
chat.greeting: Hello. How can I help you understand our operational services?

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At NEXURA, we take the protection of your personal information seriously. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your data, in accordance with Quebec Law 25 and federal PIPEDA.

collection.title: Information Collected
collection.content: We collect information you provide directly: name, email address, professional contact information, and data related to your assessment requests. We also automatically collect technical browsing data.

use.title: Use of Data
use.content: Your information is used to: respond to your requests, provide our automation services, improve our website, and send you communications if you have consented.

sharing.title: Data Sharing
sharing.content: We never sell your personal data. We may share your information with our service providers (hosting, payment, email) strictly within the scope of our operations.

retention.title: Retention
retention.content: We retain your data as long as necessary to provide our services or as required by applicable legal obligations.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access your data, correct it, delete it, and withdraw your consent. To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy@nexuradata.ca.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: For any questions about this policy, write to us at privacy@nexuradata.ca or by mail to NEXURA, Montreal, Quebec, Canada.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using the NEXURA website and services, you agree to these terms. These terms are governed by the laws of Quebec.

services.title: Description of Services
services.content: NEXURA offers consulting and implementation services in business operations automation. Solutions are customized according to each client's needs.

obligations.title: Your Obligations
obligations.content: You agree to provide accurate information, use our services legally, and respect intellectual property rights.

payment.title: Payment
payment.content: Prices are indicated in Canadian dollars. Payment is due according to the terms agreed for each project. Applicable taxes are extra.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: NEXURA cannot be held liable for indirect damages resulting from the use of our services. Our liability is limited to the amount paid for the services concerned.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.content: Website content (text, images, logos) belongs to NEXURA. Solutions developed for you belong to you, unless otherwise indicated.

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: We may suspend or terminate your access to services in case of violation of these terms.
